title: <$libraryName>
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: <$libraryName> The library in which a global object resides. <$libraryName> Values Library name Scope IncludeScript, global ProcScript, and menu triggers Description The <$libraryName> compile-time constant represents the name of the library in which a global object resides.
